misconfig_patterns: Operators run apiServerMultiUser=false (single-user mode) to skip Dex+Istio setup
Single-user-mode Pipelines API is exposed unauthenticated on the public internet
Experiment names disclose customer fleet for B2B AI SaaS deployments

active_probe.false_positive_check: Response must be JSON with experiments[] key; many Shodan title-hits are stale banners

deployment_tells: GCP us-east5 region (35.212.x) hosts multiple Kubeflow tenants
Adjacent /24 is typically unrelated cloud tenants (no operator cluster)
pivot_paths: GET /pipeline/apis/v1beta1/experiments -> customer fleet via experiment names
GET /pipeline/apis/v1beta1/runs/{id} -> input parameters incl secrets, model URIs
POST /pipeline/apis/v1beta1/runs -> arbitrary pipeline trigger on operator compute
/jupyter notebook endpoints typically equally exposed in single-user mode
vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-47237 - Istio permissions allow Kubeflow auth token stealing
Single-user mode is by-design unauth and operators commonly expose it publicly
